creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
package creation fails due to missing file /usr/local/bin/glav

output of portmaster:
..
===>>> Creating a package for new version mjpegtools-2.0.0_3
tar: bin/glav: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256

===>>> Package creation of mjpegtools-2.0.0_3 failed
===>>> Aborting update


Similar info can be produced by pkg_info -g mjpegtools-2.0.0_3

Fix: 

for now, only deselection of build option "GTK2" seems to help.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/multimedia/mjpegtools
make rmconfig
portmaster -g .
